summary: Phase 6 complete: all 4 tasks done. Added default show, --sync, and --edit command sections to harness-roadmap SKILL.md on both platforms. Updated When to Use (removed Phase 6 deferral), Success Criteria (18 items covering all 5 commands), Gates (added sync-without-roadmap and edit-without-confirmation gates), and skill.yaml args description (lists all 5 commands). gemini-cli files are byte-identical copies of claude-code. harness validate passes.
learnings: Prettier reformats *asterisk emphasis* in markdown headings to _underscore emphasis_ -- does not affect semantics but changes the raw markdown
cp-based mirroring to gemini-cli remains the safest approach for guaranteed file identity
